code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [CloudNative_ServiceMesh] --> AppInitialization
    
    AppInitialization --> PerformanceAssessment : Start Performance Monitor
    
    PerformanceAssessment --> DeviceCapabilityCheck
    DeviceCapabilityCheck --> InitialModeSelection
    
    InitialModeSelection --> UltraFastMode : Low-end Device
    InitialModeSelection --> FastMode : Mid-range Device
    InitialModeSelection --> BalancedMode : High-end Device
    InitialModeSelection --> HighQualityMode : Premium Device
    
    state UltraFastMode {CloudNative_Serverless] --> QuarterResolution
        QuarterResolution --> BasicFaceDetection
        BasicFaceDetection --> MinimalProcessing
        MinimalProcessing --> LowBatteryUsage
        LowBatteryUsage --> PerformanceMonitoring
    }
    
    state FastMode {CloudNative_K8sCluster] --> HalfResolution
        HalfResolution --> FaceDetection
        FaceDetection --> BasicNSFWDetection
        BasicNSFWDetection --> ModerateBatteryUsage
        ModerateBatteryUsage --> PerformanceMonitoring
    }
    
    state BalancedMode {CloudNative_ServiceMesh] --> FullResolution
        FullResolution --> CompleteFaceDetection
        CompleteFaceDetection --> FullNSFWDetection
        FullNSFWDetection --> GenderClassification
        GenderClassification --> OptimalBatteryUsage
        OptimalBatteryUsage --> PerformanceMonitoring
    }
    
    state HighQualityMode {CloudNative_K8sCluster] --> EnhancedResolution
        EnhancedResolution --> AdvancedFaceDetection
        AdvancedFaceDetection --> EnhancedNSFWDetection
        EnhancedNSFWDetection --> DetailedGenderClassification
        DetailedGenderClassification --> ContentDensityAnalysis
        ContentDensityAnalysis --> HighBatteryUsage
        HighBatteryUsage --> PerformanceMonitoring
    }
    
    PerformanceMonitoring --> ContinuousMonitoring
    
    state ContinuousMonitoring {CloudNative_DockerImage] --> CPUUsageCheck
        CPUUsageCheck --> MemoryUsageCheck
        MemoryUsageCheck --> BatteryLevelCheck
        BatteryLevelCheck --> ThermalStateCheck
        ThermalStateCheck --> NetworkLatencyCheck
        NetworkLatencyCheck --> PerformanceDecision
    }
    
    PerformanceDecision --> MaintainCurrentMode : Performance Good
    PerformanceDecision --> DegradePerformance : Performance Issues
    PerformanceDecision --> ImprovePerformance : Resources Available
    
    state DegradePerformance {CloudNative_DockerImage] --> ReduceDetectionFrequency
        ReduceDetectionFrequency --> LowerResolution
        LowerResolution --> DisableNonEssentialFeatures
        DisableNonEssentialFeatures --> IncreaseCacheUsage
        IncreaseCacheUsage --> OptimizeMemoryUsage
    }
    
    state ImprovePerformance {CloudNative_K8sCluster] --> IncreaseDetectionQuality
        IncreaseDetectionQuality --> HigherResolution
        HigherResolution --> EnableAdditionalFeatures
        EnableAdditionalFeatures --> ReduceCacheDependency
        ReduceCacheDependency --> EnhancePrecision
    }
    
    DegradePerformance --> AdaptiveAdjustment
    ImprovePerformance --> AdaptiveAdjustment
    MaintainCurrentMode --> AdaptiveAdjustment
    
    state AdaptiveAdjustment {CloudNative_HelmChart] --> ApplyChanges
        ApplyChanges --> TestNewSettings
        TestNewSettings --> ValidatePerformance
        ValidatePerformance --> UpdateConfiguration
    }
    
    AdaptiveAdjustment --> ContinuousMonitoring : Return to Monitoring
    
    %% Emergency scenarios
    ContinuousMonitoring --> EmergencyMode : Critical Performance Issue
    
    state EmergencyMode {CloudNative_HelmChart] --> MinimalDetection
        MinimalDetection --> CriticalFeaturesOnly
        CriticalFeaturesOnly --> MaximumCaching
        MaximumCaching --> EmergencyOptimization
        EmergencyOptimization --> GradualRecovery
    }
    
    EmergencyMode --> ContinuousMonitoring : Performance Recovered
    
    %% User-triggered changes
    ContinuousMonitoring --> UserModeChange : User Changes Settings
    
    state UserModeChange {CloudNative_DockerImage] --> ValidateUserChoice
        ValidateUserChoice --> ApplyUserSettings
        ApplyUserSettings --> WarnIfIncompatible
        WarnIfIncompatible --> AcceptOverride
    }
    
    UserModeChange --> ContinuousMonitoring : Settings Applied
    
    %% Battery-specific optimizations
    ContinuousMonitoring --> BatteryOptimization : Low Battery Detected
    
    state BatteryOptimization {CloudNative_ServiceMesh] --> ReduceProcessingFrequency
        ReduceProcessingFrequency --> DisableBackgroundFeatures
        DisableBackgroundFeatures --> MinimizeCPUIntensiveTasks
        MinimizeCPUIntensiveTasks --> EnableDeepCaching
        EnableDeepCaching --> BatterySaveMode
    }
    
    BatteryOptimization --> ContinuousMonitoring : Battery Level Improved
    
    %% Thermal management
    ContinuousMonitoring --> ThermalThrottling : Overheating Detected
    
    state ThermalThrottling {CloudNative_ServiceMesh] --> ReduceProcessorUsage
        ReduceProcessorUsage --> IncreaseProcessingIntervals
        IncreaseProcessingIntervals --> DisableGPUAcceleration
        DisableGPUAcceleration --> CooldownPause
        CooldownPause --> ThermalRecovery
    }
    
    ThermalThrottling --> ContinuousMonitoring : Temperature Normal
    
    note right of UltraFastMode
        Basic protection with minimal resource usage
        - Face detection only
        - 224x224 resolution
        - 500ms intervals
        - ~2% battery/hour
    end note
    
    note right of BalancedMode
        Recommended mode for most users
        - Full feature set
        - Native resolution
        - 2000ms intervals
        - ~5-8% battery/hour
    end note
    
    note right of HighQualityMode
        Maximum accuracy and features
        - Enhanced processing
        - Content density analysis
        - 3000ms intervals
        - ~12-15% battery/hour
    end note
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个智能图像处理系统的状态流转图，核心是基于云原生架构的动态性能适配。入口应该是ServiceMesh触发的应用初始化。
明白，所以CloudNative_ServiceMesh作为起点，然后进入AppInitialization。初始化之后直接到性能评估吗？还是需要先有个启动监控的环节？
对，AppInitialization通过Start Performance Monitor触发PerformanceAssessment，然后要做设备能力检查，根据硬件档次分流到四种运行模式。
四种模式：UltraFastMode对应低端设备，FastMode中端，BalancedMode高端，HighQualityMode旗舰设备。每个模式内部都有独立的处理流水线对吧？
没错。UltraFastMode走Serverless路径，从QuarterResolution到BasicFaceDetection，再到MinimalProcessing和LowBatteryUsage。这个模式要极致省电。
已添加UltraFastMode状态机，包含Serverless入口和四个处理阶段。FastMode我用K8sCluster作为入口，HalfResolution配合FaceDetection和BasicNSFWDetection，电池消耗标为ModerateBatteryUsage。
BalancedMode是主力模式，回到ServiceMesh入口，FullResolution配合CompleteFaceDetection、FullNSFWDetection，还要加上GenderClassification，最后到OptimalBatteryUsage。
BalancedMode结构已确认。HighQualityMode继续用K8sCluster，EnhancedResolution配AdvancedFaceDetection、EnhancedNSFWDetection、DetailedGenderClassification，还要做ContentDensityAnalysis，电池消耗标为HighBatteryUsage。
四个模式最后都要汇聚到PerformanceMonitoring，然后进入ContinuousMonitoring状态。这个监控模块用DockerImage作为入口，要检查CPU、内存、电池、温度和延迟。
ContinuousMonitoring已构建，包含五个检查节点，最后到PerformanceDecision。决策点分出三条路：性能良好维持现状、有问题降级、资源充裕提升。
DegradePerformance用DockerImage入口，执行ReduceDetectionFrequency、LowerResolution、DisableNonEssentialFeatures、IncreaseCacheUsage、OptimizeMemoryUsage。ImprovePerformance走K8sCluster，做反向优化。
两条优化路径都指向AdaptiveAdjustment，用HelmChart管理配置变更。包含ApplyChanges、TestNewSettings、ValidatePerformance、UpdateConfiguration，最后返回ContinuousMonitoring。
还需要几个异常分支。ContinuousMonitoring检测到Critical Performance Issue要进EmergencyMode，也是HelmChart入口，做MinimalDetection、CriticalFeaturesOnly、MaximumCaching、EmergencyOptimization，然后GradualRecovery。
EmergencyMode已添加，恢复后返回ContinuousMonitoring。用户主动切换设置的分支我也加上：UserModeChange用DockerImage入口，ValidateUserChoice、ApplyUserSettings、WarnIfIncompatible，最后AcceptOverride。
电池优化和温控也要独立出来。Low Battery Detected触发BatteryOptimization，ServiceMesh入口，ReduceProcessingFrequency、DisableBackgroundFeatures、MinimizeCPUIntensiveTasks、EnableDeepCaching、BatterySaveMode。
BatteryOptimization已完成。ThermalThrottling同样用ServiceMesh，Overheating Detected触发，包含ReduceProcessorUsage、IncreaseProcessingIntervals、DisableGPUAcceleration、CooldownPause、ThermalRecovery。
ImprovePerformance的具体步骤我再确认下：IncreaseDetectionQuality、HigherResolution、EnableAdditionalFeatures、ReduceCacheDependency，最后EnhancePrecision对吧？
是的，五个步骤完整。我注意到四个主要模式最后都缺了PerformanceMonitoring的汇聚点，需要补上吗？
补上，每个模式内部最后都要指向PerformanceMonitoring。另外给三个主要模式加右侧注释，说明分辨率、检测间隔和耗电数据。
已添加汇聚连接和注释。UltraFastMode标注224x224分辨率、500ms间隔、约2%每小时耗电；BalancedMode标注原生分辨率、2000ms间隔、5-8%耗电；HighQualityMode标注增强处理、3000ms间隔、12-15%耗电。
FastMode的注释需要加吗？还是只保留这三个？另外ContinuousMonitoring到AdaptiveAdjustment的连接，MaintainCurrentMode也要连过去对吧？
MaintainCurrentMode确实要连到AdaptiveAdjustment，三条决策分支最终都汇聚。FastMode作为中间档，注释我先不加，保持图面简洁。检查下整体结构：所有异常分支都能回到ContinuousMonitoring形成闭环。
最后确认几个云原生组件的分配：UltraFastMode用Serverless应对突发低负载，FastMode和HighQualityMode用K8sCluster保证弹性，BalancedMode和电池、温控优化用ServiceMesh做服务治理，监控和降级用DockerImage，配置管理用HelmChart。
云原生架构映射已完成。完整状态图包含：1个入口、4个主运行模式、1个持续监控核心、3条性能决策路径、4个异常处理分支，全部通过AdaptiveAdjustment形成动态调优闭环。
PerformanceDecision到三条分支的触发条件标注清楚了吗？Performance Good、Performance Issues、Resources Available。
发现遗漏，ImprovePerformance内部我少画了一个节点，应该是五个步骤：IncreaseDetectionQuality、HigherResolution、EnableAdditionalFeatures、ReduceCacheDependency、EnhancePrecision。现在补上了EnhancePrecision。
好的，现在ImprovePerformance完整了。最后检查：AdaptiveAdjustment返回ContinuousMonitoring的标注是Return to Monitoring，EmergencyMode和UserModeChange的返回标注也正确吧？

全部确认：AdaptiveAdjustment标注Return to Monitoring，EmergencyMode是Performance Recovered，UserModeChange是Settings Applied，BatteryOptimization是Battery Level Improved，ThermalThrottling是Temperature Normal。状态图完整可用。
